allow: Bash(ssh root@72.56.35.143 "export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive && apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl ca-certificates gnupg lsb-release git 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo done")
Bash(ssh root@72.56.35.143 "mkdir -p /var/www && cd /var/www && git clone https://github.com/wfmvgo/justplanner.git 2>&1 | tail -3 && ls /var/www/justplanner | head -20")

Bash(rsync -avz --delete --exclude node_modules --exclude dist --exclude .env --exclude .env.local --exclude 'github_actions_key*' --exclude google-credentials.json --exclude dashboard/google-credentials.json --exclude dashboard/.env --exclude dashboard/dashboard.log --exclude cohort_analysis.py --exclude JustPlanner_Cohort_Analysis.xlsx -e 'ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no' ./ root@72.56.35.143:/var/www/justplanner/)

Bash(ssh root@72.56.35.143 "chmod 600 /var/www/justplanner/server/.env /var/www/justplanner/dashboard/.env /var/www/justplanner/dashboard/google-credentials.json && echo DISABLE_RENEWAL_CRON=true >> /var/www/justplanner/server/.env && echo '--- new env last lines ---' && tail -3 /var/www/justplanner/server/.env | sed 's/=.*/=***/'")
Bash(ssh root@72.56.35.143 "cd /var/www/justplanner && npm install 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo === server install === && cd server && npm install 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(ssh root@72.56.35.143 "cd /var/www/justplanner && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10")
Bash(ssh root@5.35.94.142 "pm2 list && echo --- && cat /var/www/justplanner/package.json | grep -A1 type && cat /var/www/justplanner/server/package.json | grep -A1 type")

Bash(ssh root@5.35.94.142 "crontab -l | grep -v daily-report.js | crontab - && echo --- new --- && crontab -l && echo --- env --- && sed -i.bak '/^TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=/d; /^TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=/d' /var/www/justplanner/server/.env && grep -c TELEGRAM /var/www/justplanner/server/.env && echo 'remaining TELEGRAM vars \(should be 2: USER_BOT_TOKEN + USER_BOT_USERNAME\)'")

Bash(rsync -avz --delete --exclude node_modules --exclude dist --exclude .env --exclude .env.local --exclude 'github_actions_key*' --exclude google-credentials.json --exclude dashboard/google-credentials.json --exclude dashboard/.env --exclude dashboard/dashboard.log --exclude cohort_analysis.py --exclude JustPlanner_Cohort_Analysis.xlsx -e ssh ./ root@72.56.35.143:/var/www/justplanner/)

Bash(ssh root@5.35.94.142 "echo --- last 15 OUT lines \(post-restart\) --- && pm2 logs justplanner-api --nostream --lines 15 --out 2>&1 | tail -20 && echo --- last 5 ERR lines --- && pm2 logs justplanner-api --nostream --lines 5 --err 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo --- timestamps --- && stat -c '%y %n' /root/.pm2/logs/justplanner-api-error.log")
